Instance Method# getPhysicalMax

DriverKit 19.0+macOS

```
uint32_t getPhysicalMax();
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getPhysicalMax#return-value)

Returns the element’s physical maximum.
